name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.0 adds official Codex Custom Agent templates while keeping Codex main control, Opus/Claude coding, Gemini testing analysis, RAG, and MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.0: official Custom Agent templates, Codex main control, Opus/Claude coding, Gemini test analysis, RAG, and MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.0 is a local Codex multi-model orchestration plugin for long-running development. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real tests, review integration, RAG writes, and final decisions. Opus/Claude performs primary coding inside authorized workspace boundaries after design plan-review. Gemini provides test strategy and failure-log analysis. This release adds .codex/agents/*.toml Custom Agent templates for visible role subagents while keeping Skill and MCP responsibilities separate.
capabilities: 本地项目记忆库（轻量 RAG）
defaultPrompt: 使用 AI Agent Swarm 处理这次代码修改，默认启用可见角色子智能体工作流。
